## Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or workflow change
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `mvn -q -DskipTests test-compile`
- [ ] Relevant local validation performed
- [ ] Documentation updated when needed
- [ ] Changelog updated when needed

## Notes for Reviewers

- Any context, tradeoffs or areas that deserve extra attention

## Related Issues

- Closes #
